markdown:
# Lunging Attack

As a [[bonus_action Action]], you can expend one Superiority Die and take the [[dash]] action. If you move at least 5 feet in a straight line immediately before hitting with a melee attack as part of the [[attack]] action on this turn, you can add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll.
